_comment: CANONICAL arsenal model registry — the ONE source of truth for per-weapon facts. Consumers DERIVE from this; never hand-copy. Readers: summon.py (cloud_tag/role/known-ids), conformity_check.py (role), .claude/hooks/weapon-gate.py (known weapons), .claude/serve.cjs (weight), build.py (weaponStatus → guild-data), gen_model_docs.py (docs). role: doer|thinker|both|media. backend: claude|minimax-direct|ollama-cloud|openai-direct|minimax-media. status: live|reserve|deactivated. cloud_tag/pull null when N/A. weight = serve.cjs usage estimate (Claude families estimated separately).

opus.summary: Deepest structural reasoning — the prime thinker for hard plans.

sonnet.summary: Balanced thinker + Claude-capable fallback — last in every arsenal.

haiku.summary: Fastest, cheapest Claude — quick mechanical reasoning.

minimax-m3.summary: The prime doer. Direct MiniMax cloud sub for bulk generation/transform.

deepseek-v4-pro.summary: Frontier multi-step reasoning — long dependency chains.

glm-5.2.summary: A different analytical frame — where others over-fit.

nemotron-3-ultra.summary: NVIDIA reasoning bench — alternate engine. Reserve: in no loadout.

qwen3.5.summary: Strong general/coding bench. Reserve: in no loadout.

gemma4.summary: Light, fast thinker — cheap second mind, esp. content/marketing (the-herald).

gpt-5.5.summary: OpenAI-direct second opinion. Deactivated — no key on device; kept in loadouts on purpose.

image-01.summary: Text→image forge. Forged every skill-art/*.png tile.
